---
title: "Recursive Decomposition Stack"
---

# Recursive Decomposition Stack

**Working seal:** `stack://recursive-decomposition-stack/10A93D734F`

**Enter:** Use when the task is too large for one spell or one session and scope can shrink recursively.

| Step | Spell               | Artifact                     | Advance when                                 |
| ---- | ------------------- | ---------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| 1    | Define contract     | Parent contract              | Boundary and obligations are clear           |
| 2    | Split into children | Smaller scopes               | Every child is smaller than parent scope     |
| 3    | Call child stack    | Solved child scope           | Child base case or child verification passes |
| 4    | Integrate           | Integrated parent scope      | Children compose under parent contract       |
| 5    | System verify       | Parent verification evidence | Children are green and parent contract holds |

## Loop or Recursion

```json
{
  "recursive": true,
  "base_case": "Scope is small enough to understand, implement, and verify in one bounded pass"
}
```


## On Fail

Stop descent if child scopes do not shrink or contract consistency is lost.

## Why It Works

It lets one choreography operate at several scales while preserving contracts at every boundary.
